title: Head Cannon
description: Adds a cannon you can wear and fire from your head!
body:
What does this mod do!?

This mod adds a cannon which you can wear on your head and use to fire TNT!

How do I fire the cannon?

Make sure you have TNT anywhere in your inventory and then press the 'R' key to fire TNT towards the direction you're looking.

How do I craft a cannon?

How do I equip the cannon?

Place it in the helmet equipment slot in the player inventory screen

Can I use it in a modpack?

Or course!
